notes: Historical follow-up failure where pronoun query attempted answer generation without prior scope. Primary failure class: document scope resolution failure. Root cause: missing_prior_scope was not consistently surfaced before retrieval/answerability. Expected post-fix behavior: safe failure out-of-scope with explicit missing prior document scope signal.

query: Is this agreement between Acme Corp and Jane Smith?

prior_messages.content: Check whether this agreement is between Acme Corp and Jane Smith.
Select a document and I can verify the party set.

notes: Historical follow-up regression where selected-document scope should have made query answerable but pipeline still behaved as missing scope. Primary failure class: document scope resolution failure. Root cause: selected scope merge was evaluated after missing_prior_scope gate. Expected post-fix behavior: resolve selected document as active scope and perform agreement-between verification.

query: In this agreement, who is the employee?
notes: Historical follow-up regression for phrasing like 'this agreement' failing despite active document scope. Primary failure class: answerability false negative (scope and evidence available but system refused). Root cause: follow-up reference normalization did not reuse resolved document IDs in downstream answerability path. Expected post-fix behavior: extract employee from active agreement intro evidence.

query: And who is the employer there?
notes: Historical regression where follow-up family recognition existed but document-scope carryover failed for 'there/that agreement' references. Primary failure class: document scope resolution failure. Root cause: conversational scope metadata not consistently merged into effective retrieval filters. Expected post-fix behavior: preserve prior resolved document scope and answer employer extraction.

query: Same document as above: is it between Acme Holdings LLC and Jane Smith?

prior_messages.content: Within this employment agreement, identify the parties.
The parties are Acme Holdings LLC and Jane Smith.

notes: Historical follow-up regression where extraction succeeded on prior turn but same-document verification failed in comparison branch. Primary failure class: synthesis failure (entity comparison output incorrect despite available scope and evidence). Root cause: normalized-party comparison path diverged from extraction path during follow-up turns. Expected post-fix behavior: stable yes/no verification consistent with prior extracted party set.
